C

calcularIndiceBloque(int, int) - Static method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Computes the block index for the cell located at the given coordinates.
Celda - Class in com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model
Represents a single cell in the 6x6 Sudoku board.
Celda(int, int) - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.Celda
Constructs a new empty cell at the specified position.
CLASE_BORDE_DERECHO - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
CSS class applied to the right edge of a 2x3 block.
CLASE_BORDE_INFERIOR - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
CSS class applied to the bottom edge of a 2x3 block.
CLASE_BORDE_INFERIOR_DERECHO - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
CSS class applied to the inner corner of two adjacent block edges.
CLASE_CELDA_ERROR - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
CSS class applied to a cell that violates a Sudoku rule.
CLASE_CELDA_FIJA - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
CSS class applied to a fixed (clue) cell.
CLASE_CELDA_SUGERENCIA - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
CSS class applied to a cell while it is being highlighted as a hint.
CLASE_ESTADO_ERROR - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
CSS class that styles the status label as an error message.
CLASE_ESTADO_EXITO - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
CSS class that styles the status label as a success message.
columna - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController.ManejadorTeclado
Column coordinate associated with this handler.
columna - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.Celda
Column index of the cell within the board (0-based).
columna - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.ProveedorAyuda.Sugerencia
Column index of the suggested cell.
columnas - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Logical grouping of cells by column.
COLUMNAS_POR_BLOQUE - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Number of columns per block.

configurarBotones() - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Configures the action handlers for the main buttons.
construirCuadricula() - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Builds the 6x6 grid of text fields and registers all event handlers on each cell.
crearCampoCelda(int, int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Creates a single configured TextField for the cell at the given position.
cuadriculaTablero - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Grid pane that hosts the 6x6 Sudoku board.
